title: dendrobianthe zuluensis
intro_study: According to "Zhongguo Zhong yao za zhi = Zhongguo zhongyao zazhi = China journal of Chinese materia medica", Dendrobium zuluensis benefits from the use of a specific fungal strain, Sebacina vermifera (FDdS-5), which can effectively promote seedling growth by increasing height, fresh and dry weight, stem diameter, and root numbers.
